_comment: Non-identifying SDK defaults for the Copilot Studio SDK (Direct-to-Engine) connection mode. Tenant-specific IDs (clientId, tenantId, environmentId) are intentionally left blank here so they are NOT committed to source control; supply them via the local .env file (ENTRA_CLIENT_ID, ENTRA_TENANT_ID, COPILOT_ENVIRONMENT_ID). Environment variables of the same name override any value set here.
